name: AMERICINN HOTEL AND CONFERENCE CENTER FOOD

violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet cloths used to clean food surfaces left out and not placed in any sanitizer between uses.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The drawers in the breakfast bar area need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single service items being stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Single-use towels being stored under the sink drain line next to the juice machine.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
